infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PGSS Guardian needs your location to include GPS coordinates in fall alerts sent to your guardian.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: PGSS Guardian uses background location for continuous fall monitoring.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: PGSS Guardian connects to your ESP32 device on the local WiFi network.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PGSS Guardian uses location for fall alert GPS coordinates.
